title: Chisos at Golden Hour
description: The winding road catches last light as the Chisos Mountains glow pink and gold against clear blue sky.

images.alt: Winding desert road with Chisos Mountains glowing at golden hour

story: Golden hour in Big Bend transforms the mountains into something almost unreal. Susan pulled over on the road back from Castolon to catch this light, and the photograph became the primary source for the warm ochre and turquoise tones that run through the Burro identity.
leadTimeNote: Archival pigment print on cotton rag. Ships flat within 5 business days.
